# Fix: AZ7RVVxwQiWuvnGqOvJV

- Rule: RS2007
- File: 4_Operation/Ecs/generator/AnalyzerReleases.Unshipped.md

## Before

```markdown
## Unshipped

| Rule ID | Category | Severity | Notes |
```

## After

```markdown
; Do not edit this file. It is used for Roslyn analyzer release tracking.
; Entries should follow the format:
; Rule ID | Category | Severity | Notes

## Unshipped

| Rule ID | Category | Severity | Notes |
```
